flow.intro: Hub mode runs HospitalRun on this computer and serves it to other devices on your local network — no internet required. You can optionally connect a Supabase project later for cloud backup.
flow.starting: Starting the clinic hub on this computer…
flow.cloudPromptBody: Connect a Supabase project to enable cloud backup and sync across sites. You can skip this and add it later in Settings.
flow.readyDesc: Other devices on the same wifi can open this address in a browser to use HospitalRun:
flow.bookmarkHelp: Bookmark this URL on tablets and other laptops in the clinic. The hub will start automatically every time you open this app on this computer.
flow.errorFallback: Something went wrong starting the hub.

firstUser.intro: Create the admin account for this hub. You'll use these credentials to sign in on this computer and on LAN devices.
firstUser.errPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters

chooseFeatures.intro: Pick the optional features you want to enable right now. Patients, appointments, labs, medications, imaging, and incidents are always available.
chooseFeatures.changeLater: You can enable or disable features anytime in Settings → Features.
chooseFeatures.errNoOrg: No organization in your session. Sign back in and try again.

cloudConnect.needProjectHelp: Create a free one, then copy the Project URL and anon key from Project Settings → API.
cloudConnect.findHubHelp: Scan this network for a HospitalRun hub instead of entering a server URL.
cloudConnect.notFound: No HospitalRun hub found on this network. You can enter the server URL below instead.
